commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.review_summary:
The PR extracts compaction usage cleanup into a shared helper, applies it to replay and live compaction cleanup, adds stale/fresh usage regression coverage, and edits `CHANGELOG.md`.

PR surface: Source +11, Tests +213, Docs 0. Total +224 across 5 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection shows current main runs the cleanup after final compaction and unconditionally zeroes every assistant usage snapshot; I did not run a live TUI/gateway reproduction in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] A narrow automated repair can remove only the release-owned changelog hunk; no product decision is needed for that cleanup.

target.title: fix(agents): preserve fresh usage after compaction
target.body:
## Summary
- Fix embedded compaction cleanup so it clears stale pre-compaction assistant usage without wiping fresh post-compaction assistant usage.
- Keep the existing compaction end `completed` payload behavior intact.
- Add focused regression coverage for stale retained usage versus fresh assistant usage after compaction.

## Credit
Clownfish replacement for #50795. This carries forward attribution for @Hollychou924 in https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/50845, @leno23 in https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/82874, @de1tydev in https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/69270, and @425072024 in https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/91468.

## Validation
- pnpm -s vitest run src/agents/embedded-agent-subscribe.handlers.compaction.test.ts
- pnpm check:changed

Clownfish 🐠 replacement reef notes:
- Cluster: ghcrawl-156678-autonomous-smoke
- Source PRs: https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/50845, https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/69270, https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/82874, https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/91468
- Credit: Credit @wuwahe3 for the open #50795 repro and source-level diagnosis.; Credit @Hollychou924 and source PR https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/50845 for the original stale-versus-fresh compaction usage approach.; Credit @leno23 and source PR https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/82874 for the later narrow handler/test proof.; Credit @de1tydev and source PR https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/69270 for broader compaction/reset invariant investigation, while keeping this replacement narrower than that branch.; Credit @425072024 and source PR https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/91468 for investigating pre-compaction tracking; do not reuse the object-identity Set design because the PR was closed as fragile across serialize/deserialize cycles.
- Validation: pnpm -s vitest run src/agents/embedded-agent-subscribe.handlers.compaction.test.ts; pnpm check:changed

fish notes: model gpt-5.5, reasoning xhigh; reviewed against 0f3740507ecb.
target.author: app/openclaw-clownfish

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
